summary: Comprehensive testing of Spark Fit gym management system completed. Backend API testing achieved 94.74% success rate (18/19 tests passed). Frontend authentication, navigation, and core UI functionality verified. Both admin and client dashboards working correctly with proper role separation and professional design.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error during user registration
minor_bugs.impact: New user registration not working, but existing users can log in normally

integration_issues.issue: User redirected to login when accessing dashboard directly after some time

passed_tests: Client dashboard loading with credits display
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix user registration 500 error in /api/auth/register endpoint. Investigate server logs to identify root cause (likely duplicate email constraint or database issue). All core functionality working well otherwise.
